data.name: Picture Perfect
data.detailed_description:
THE STORY

WARNING 18+: You are a photographer who is close with three young women. There's 18 year-old Miracle who is so shy and introverted she won't leave the house without you., 20 year-old Sasha who dreams of starring on Broadway. And 22 year-old Paris who dropped out of college to mooch off you once more. Ever since the girls' mother abandoned you and them several years ago, you've had a tough time managing everything, to say the least, because you didn’t want to abandon the girls either with them having no other family, even though you were their mother’s fiancé.

THE GAME PLAY

In Picture Perfect, you play as the main character and take control of all the decision-making, such as deciding to be stricter on a character or be more understanding. You have full control of how you play, and which characters you'll be spending time with. But be careful! Rejecting to spend time with a character or choosing the wrong choices may disable you from their route, and all future content with them because most choices have hidden points that you gain or lose!

***A free in-game walkthrough is also included for those who have trouble with selecting the correct choices, or for players who want to access every scene!***

FEATURES

- Name your own characters

- Define the relationship within the game

- Select choices that shape the story you want

- Replay the game and choose different choices to access all content

- Colorful collection of music while you play

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7
  • 處理器: 1.8GHz Dual-Core CPU
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Integrated graphics
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: OS X 10.9
  • 處理器: 1.8GHz Dual-Core CPU
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Integrated graphics
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: x86/x86_64
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Integrated Graphics
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
